channel.title: 前端 on Ash Blog
channel.description: Recent content in 前端 on Ash Blog

item.title: Docker配置Prometheus、Alertmanager、Grafana和Mysql
item.author: shijunshen424@gmail.com (SHI Junshen (ASH))
item.description: Docker 配置 Prometheus+Alertmanager+Grafana+Mysql Prometheus 1、下载镜像包： docker pull prom/prometheus 2、配置 Prometheus mkdir /opt/prometheus cd /opt/prometheus/ vim prometheus.yml #opt是linux中存放第三方软件的文件夹 内容如下： global: scrape_interval: 60s evaluation_interval: 60s scrape_configs: - job_name: prometheus static_configs: - targets: ['localhost:9090'] labels: instance: prometheus - job_name: Data static_configs: - targets: ['192.
